015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.Bean;
020import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
021import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.petstore.service.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache.*;
027
028/**
029 * Petstore Mustache view demo.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * Demonstrates rendering a templated HTML pet detail page through the {@code juneau-rest-server-view-mustache}
033 * bridge.  Lives in {@code juneau-petstore-core} so both the Jetty and Spring Boot deployments inherit it
034 * unchanged — Mustache is a pure-classpath engine and renders identically under either embedded container.
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * The {@code @RestGet("/pets/{id}/view")} method returns {@link MustacheView}; the configured
038 * {@link MustacheViewRenderer} (registered via {@code @Rest(responseProcessors=...)}) detects the return type,
039 * resolves the {@code pet.mustache} template under {@code petstore-templates/} on the classpath, and renders
040 * it directly to the response writer.
041 *
042 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
043 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/MustacheViewSupport">Mustache View Support</a>
044 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauPetstoreOverview">juneau-petstore</a>
045 * </ul>
046 */
047@Rest(
048   path="/pet-views/mustache",
049   title="Pet detail (Mustache)",
050   description="Renders a pet detail page through the Mustache view-rendering bridge.",
051   responseProcessors={MustacheViewRenderer.class}
052)
053@SuppressWarnings({
054   "java:S110" // Inheritance depth acceptable for example/demo code
055})
056public class PetMustacheViewResource extends BasicRestServlet {
057
058   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
059
060   private final transient PetStore store = new PetStore();
061
062   /**
063    * Provides a {@link MustacheMixin} configured to resolve templates under {@code petstore-templates/} with
064    * an implicit {@code .mustache} suffix — so {@code MustacheView.of("pet")} resolves to the classpath
065    * resource {@code petstore-templates/pet.mustache}.
066    *
067    * @return The mustache mixin bean.
068    */
069   @Bean
070   public MustacheMixin mustache() {
071      return MustacheMixin.create()
072         .basePath("/petstore-templates/")
073         .templateSuffix(".mustache")
074         .build();
075   }
076
077   /**
078    * GET /pets/{id}/view — renders a pet detail HTML page through Mustache.
079    *
080    * @param id The pet ID.
081    * @return A {@link MustacheView} bound to the {@code pet} template.
082    * @throws NotFound If no pet with the given ID exists.
083    */
084   @RestGet("/pets/{id}/view")
085   public View viewPet(@Path("id") long id) {
086      var pet = store.getPet(id);
087      if (pet == null)
088         throw new NotFound("Pet not found: id={0}", id);
089      return MustacheView.of("pet").attr("pet", pet);
090   }
091}
